mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, amount, remark, phone, address, consignee, estimated_delivery_time, pack_amount, tableware_number,tableware_status,pay_status,pay_method,status,delivery_status) VALUES (#{number},#{userId},#{addressBookId},#{orderTime},#{checkoutTime},#{amount},#{remark}, #{phone},#{address},#{consignee}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime},#{packAmount},#{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus},#{payStatus},#{payMethod},#{status},#{deliveryStatus})
